name: Pommes Caramel (Caramel Apples)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the margarine or butter in a frying pan over medium heat.
2. Gradually add sugar to the melted fat, stirring until completely dissolved and well blended.
3. Add vanilla and stir again.
4. Core unpeeled apples and cut them into quarters.
5. Place apple pieces into the mixture and simmer uncovered on medium heat, basting frequently with syrup for 15-20 minutes.
